title: Occupational Health and Safety Master Program
content:
Occupational Health and Safety Master Program

Occupational Health and Safety Master's Program About the Master's Program

GRADUATE SCHOOL OF

Occupational health and safety non-thesis master's program is one of the rising values in parallel to the law of Occupational health and safety numbered 6331, which entered into force in 2012. It deals with important issues such as the health and safety of employees, prevention of occupational accidents and occupational diseases. It is one of the most preferred programs today in the context of specialization for all engineering fields. Persons who have completed the NON-THESIS program are entitled to enter the B Class Specialization Examination of the Ministry of Labor and Social Security. Candidates who hold a Master of Occupational Safety degree can respond to the needs of trained staff in this field in the domestic and abroad sectors with qualified information they receive.

The pride of being the only university with occupational Health and Safety Laboratory in Turkey, technical courses in computer laboratories, licensed security engineering software programs, experienced staff and expert instructors trained in this field is given the most ambitious graduate education in our country.

Occupational health and safety NON-THESIS graduate education application requirements

Undergraduate graduates (preferably undergraduates of engineering, architecture, all undergraduate graduates may apply)

The Master's Degree without thesis is directly entitled to enter "B" Classes within the Specialization Exams opened by the Ministry of Labor and Social Security.

(With the conditions and departments required by the Ministry of Labor and Social Security for Undergraduate Graduation)

The scope of the master's program without thesis on Occupational health and safety

The Non-thesis master’s program consists of at least 10 courses and graduation project work, with no less than 30 credits. The non-thesis master's program consists of a total of at least 90 ECTS credits, with no less than 30 ECTS credits of an education period.

Occupational health and safety Non-thesis graduate program period

The duration of the master’s program without thesis is two semesters regardless of whether they are enrolled for each semester and the program is completed in maximum three semesters.

OCCUPATIONAL HEALTH AND SAFETY MASTER'S PROGRAM WITH THESIS

The Occupational Health and Safety post-graduate education is one of the rising values parallel to the Occupational Health and Safety Law No. 6331, which was enacted in 2012. It is a clear field of academic research for different disciplines with its newness as a scientific field. It is structured to introduce interdisciplinary studies and scientific products in legal fields, engineering, technical fields. It is one of the most preferred programs today in the context of specialization for all engineering fields. It is possible for candidates who are specialized in occupational safety to work towards the needs of trained personnel in all sectors, both in Turkey and abroad. The pride of being the only university with occupational Health and Safety Laboratory in Turkey, technical courses in computer laboratories, licensed security engineering software programs, experienced staff and expert instructors trained in this field is given the most ambitious graduate education in our country.

Graduated Master's Degree students with thesis are directly entitled to enter "B" Classes within the Specialization Exams opened by the Ministry of Labor and Social Security.

(With the conditions and departments required by the Ministry of Labor and Social Security for Undergraduate Graduation)

Occupational Health and Safety Thesis Master's Degree Application Requirements

Undergraduate graduates,

From the Academic Personnel and Postgraduate Education Entrance Exam (ALES) with 55 base points,

Preferably candidates who have a foreign language.

Although it is preferably for engineering graduates, all undergraduate graduates can apply to the program.

Scope of master’s program with thesis on Occupational health and safety

The master's program with thesis consists of at least ten courses, a seminar course and a graduation thesis, with no less than 30 credits. The seminar course and thesis work are non-credit and evaluated as successful or unsuccessful. Thesis graduate program consists of at least 120 ECTS credits including a minimum of ten courses and a thesis study excluding the seminar with no less than 30 ECTS credits.

Occupational health and safety with thesis graduate program duration

The duration of the master's program with thesis is four semesters, regardless of whether they are enrolled for each semester, starting from the semester when the courses related to the program in which they are enrolled are registered, excluding the time spent in the scientific preparation.
